name: Pike Drill
description: Hours in formation until shoulders burn.

name: Sword Yard
description: Dull blades, bruised hands, fewer mistakes.

name: Match and Powder
description: Slow loading in damp air while the sergeant curses.

name: Company Discipline
description: Stand still, move together, fear later.

name: Pack March
description: Mud road, full pack, no complaint that helps.
